tasks.title: Scale PostgreSQL for Production
subtasks: Scale CloudNative-PG 'sigma1-postgres' cluster from 1 to 3 replicas.
Deploy and configure PgBouncer for connection pooling to 'sigma1-postgres'.
Configure WAL archiving for 'sigma1-postgres' to S3/R2 bucket 'sigma1-assets'.

tasks.title: Scale Redis/Valkey for Production
subtasks: Enable Redis Sentinel for 'sigma1-valkey' with 3 replicas.

tasks.title: Implement Production Ingress and TLS
subtasks: Deploy and configure an Ingress controller (e.g., NGINX or Envoy) for external access to services.
Configure cert-manager to provision TLS certificates for all public-facing services using Let's Encrypt.
Apply TLS certificates to Ingress resources.

tasks.title: Configure CDN and Network Policies
subtasks: Configure Cloudflare CDN for static assets served from S3/R2 bucket 'sigma1-assets'.
Implement Kubernetes Network Policies to restrict pod-to-pod traffic based on service roles and namespaces.

tasks.title: Implement Production Observability Stack
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry collector with appropriate sampling rates for all services.
Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage for trace data.
Define and configure alert rules for key Service Level Objective (SLO) violations.
